2605.18191.title: Pairwise Preference Reward and Group-Based Diversity Enhancement for Superior Open-Ended Generation
2605.18191.paper_summary: Current reinforcement learning(RL) methods are broadly applicable and powerful in verifiable settings where scalar rewards can be provided. However, in open-ended generation tasks, verifying the correctness of responses remains challenging, and training reward models incurs substantial computational and annotation costs. Moreover, reinforcement learning (RLVR) often leads to diversity collapse and produces stereotypical or rigid outputs, outcomes that are particularly undesirable in open-domain scenarios. We propose Pairwise Preference Reward and Group-based Diversity Enhancement (PPR-GDE), a RL method that is more suitable for open-ended generation. PPR-GDE does not require scalar rewards and incorporates group-level diversity into the reward signal, it preserves the comparative structure of subjective evaluation through a pairwise preference reward, mitigates judge position bias via repeated comparisons with swapped response order, and introduces a group-based diversity reward that explicitly encourages semantic dispersion within a response group, all of these reward signals are integrated into a unified group-relative policy optimization objective. We instantiate PPR-GDE on role-playing task, experiments show that PPR-GDE achieves a better alignment quality as well as expressive diversity than strong RL baselines. Further analysis shows that pairwise preference is critical for preference alignment in subjective perspective, while the diversity metric plays an essential role in achieving superior expressive diversity and broader semantic coverage.
2605.18191.paper_summary_zh: 目前的強化學習（RL）方法在可以提供標量獎勵的可驗證環境中廣泛適用且功能強大。<lb/>然而，在開放式生成任務中，驗證回應的正確性仍然具有挑戰性，訓練獎勵模型會產生可觀的計算和標註成本。<lb/>此外，強化學習（RLVR）往往導致多樣性崩潰，並產生刻板或僵化的輸出，這些結果在開放域場景中特別不受歡迎。<lb/>我們提出了成對偏好獎勵和基於群體的多樣性增強（PPR-GDE），這是一種更適合開放式生成的RL方法。<lb/>PPR-GDE不需要標量獎勵，並將群體層級的多樣性納入獎勵信號中，它通過成對偏好獎勵保留主觀評估的比較結構，通過重複比較並交換回應順序來減輕評判者位置偏見，並引入一種基於群體的多樣性獎勵，明確鼓勵回應群體內的語義擴散，所有這些獎勵信號都整合到一個統一的群體相對政策優化目標中。<lb/>我們在角色扮演任務上實現了PPR-GDE，實驗顯示PPR-GDE在對齊質量和表達多樣性方面優於強大的RL基準。<lb/>進一步分析顯示，成對偏好對於主觀視角中的偏好對齊至關重要，而多樣性指標在實現卓越的表達多樣性和更廣泛的語義覆蓋方面扮演著重要角色。
2605.18191.author: Guining Cao et.al.
2605.18191.authors: Guining Cao, Jiaxin Peng, Chu Zeng, Yu Zhao, Shuangyong Song,  Yongxiang
